description_long: This is a plush, round stuffed toy designed to resemble a sheep, with a fluffy, textured white exterior that mimics wool. The face is made from a smoother, lighter fabric and features embroidered eyes, a smiling mouth, and a simple nose, giving it a friendly and approachable expression. The toy has two small, rounded ears on top of its head and four stubby limbs—two arms and two legs—crafted from the same soft material as the face. The body is almost perfectly spherical, making the toy appear chubby and huggable. It sits atop a colorful, patterned blanket with star and animal motifs, which is not part of the toy itself. The overall appearance is soft, inviting, and suitable for children or as a decorative plush in urban environments.
description: A round, fluffy white stuffed sheep with a smiling face, small ears, and stubby limbs, made from soft plush fabric. The toy is highly textured and appears very huggable and friendly.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sheep's round, fluffy body, one ear, and one arm, with the face partially visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the sheep's smiling face, both ears, both arms, and both legs, highlighting its friendly expression.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sheep's head and body, with both ears and the back of the legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the round, fluffy body and one leg, with the face not visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is smiling, with upturned corners of the mouth and wide, open eyes, giving a cheerful and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a sitting posture with its arms slightly extended outward and legs positioned forward, giving it a stable and welcoming stance.
